bug_report.summary: After switching editor language to French, Select tool tooltip shows English text for Ctrl/Ctrl+Alt shortcut lines (mixed-language tooltip)
steps_to_reproduce: Open a project in the Godot editor.
Go to Editor Settings → Interface → Editor Language and set it to French (fr). Restart if prompted.
Open the 2D workspace and hover the Select tool button to show its tooltip (hold Shift if needed to show extended tooltip).
expected_behaviors: Tooltip content should be consistently localized to French (e.g., using “Glisser” and French descriptions) while showing shortcuts in the corrected “Ctrl+…” format.
actual_behaviors: The tooltip becomes mixed-language: the Ctrl/Ctrl+Alt shortcut lines switch to English and use “Drag” (e.g., “Ctrl+Drag: Rotate selected node around pivot.” and “Ctrl+Alt+Drag: Scale selected node.”) while other lines remain in French (Parsed_Info bboxes #1 and #0).
